job_title: Personal Care Worker — Home Care Services
summary: PCW delivering in-home care to older people.
responsibilities: Provide personal care in clients' homes
Support clients with light domestic assistance
Assist with mobility around the home and community outings
Build trusting relationships with clients and families

skill_evidence.empathy: Demonstrates empathy and a warm, respectful manner.
skill_evidence.relationship building: Build strong, trusting relationships with clients and their families
skill_evidence.home care: deliver in-home care to older people
skill_evidence.personal care: Provide personal care in clients' homes
skill_evidence.showering and bathing: including showering, dressing and toileting assistance
skill_evidence.toileting assistance: including showering, dressing and toileting assistance
skill_evidence.domestic assistance: Support clients with light domestic assistance
